series_metadata.series_description: Miscellaneous plans, specifications, change orders, contracts, proposals, etc., relating to the construction and operation of the Frank J. Lausche Building.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain in operating area while project is under construction for current bienium, plus 1 additional bienium while in operation. Retain in storage for 6 calendar years, then destroy, provided record has been audited and audit has been released., Paper: Wastepaper
